evidence_summary: WesBank publishes fleet solutions covering fleet funding, procurement, fleet management and disposals, and a lease agreements page for business vehicles with maintenance options and full maintenance lease wording.
notes_uncertainties: Detailed product taxonomy to be captured in Phase 2.

evidence_summary: Standard Bank publishes fleet management solutions including full maintenance rental, operating rental references, managed maintenance, Shari'ah fleet management and fleet cards.
notes_uncertainties: Specific product variants and functionality will be separated in Phase 2 and Phase 3.

evidence_summary: Absa discloses full maintenance leases, operating rentals and finance leases under its business vehicle and asset finance pages.
notes_uncertainties: Product availability and naming should be confirmed against current brochures in Phase 2.

evidence_summary: Eqstra describes itself as a division of Nedbank and publishes full-maintenance leasing and fleet management services for South African fleets.
notes_uncertainties: Nedbank/Eqstra brand architecture should be watched when comparing against NedFleet.

evidence_summary: Merchant West publishes fleet management, operating lease and full maintenance lease offerings for South African business fleets.
notes_uncertainties: Ownership detail beyond Merchant West not expanded in Phase 1.

evidence_summary: Avis Fleet publishes full maintenance lease, fleet management and telematics offerings, and describes end-to-end vehicle sourcing, financing, maintenance and disposal.
notes_uncertainties: Distinguish Avis Fleet from Avis Rent a Car in later product extraction.

target_segment: Public sector, corporate and enterprise fleet customers
evidence_summary: FleetAfrica publishes specialised fleet management and full maintenance leasing solutions and identifies itself as a division of Super Group Africa.
notes_uncertainties: Claims such as '#1 provider' are treated as provider wording and require validation if used analytically.

evidence_summary: NedFleet public material states a specialty in full maintenance leasing and operating rentals; SAVRALA also lists NedFleet.
notes_uncertainties: Requires validation because Nedbank acquired Eqstra and current brand/product overlap is unclear from public sources.

evidence_summary: Bidvest Bank publishes fleet finance and fleet services including full maintenance lease-style finance where vehicles and related services are bundled.
notes_uncertainties: Phase 2 should distinguish finance, fleet card and leasing products.

evidence_summary: CFAO Mobility publishes South African fleet solutions with buy, lease or rent options, flexible leasing and finance, maintenance and servicing plans.
notes_uncertainties: Phase 2 should confirm whether CFAO acts as provider, dealer-channel arranger, or both.

evidence_summary: Pace Fleet Services describes itself as a South African car leasing company offering subscription-based vehicle leasing and fully maintained vehicle fleets.
notes_uncertainties: Owner-operator model should be treated separately from conventional corporate fleet leasing.

evidence_summary: Avis iLease publishes flexible monthly car leasing offers in South Africa with lease-style monthly pricing.
notes_uncertainties: Relationship to Avis Fleet and Avis Rent a Car should be separated during product extraction.

parent_company: Imperial / Motus group relationship requires validation
target_segment: Commercial truck and logistics fleet customers
evidence_summary: Imperial Truck Rental publishes full maintenance offerings with rental periods from 24 to 60 months, fleet management technology, maintenance scheduling, accident assistance and breakdown management.
notes_uncertainties: Parent-company detail should be validated during provider profiling.

evidence_summary: Spartan Truck Hire publishes full maintenance leasing for long-term commercial vehicle and fleet rental.
notes_uncertainties: Commercial-vehicle focus; include if heavy fleet is in scope.

evidence_summary: Value publishes commercial vehicle rental and full-maintenance lease options for trucks and logistics fleets.
notes_uncertainties: Product detail to be separated between rental and lease options in Phase 2.

evidence_summary: Power Truck Hire publishes truck leasing and management with finance and maintenance package references.
notes_uncertainties: Heavy commercial specialist.

evidence_summary: Elite Truck Hire publishes short-term rental and full-maintenance leasing services across South Africa.
notes_uncertainties: Current shareholder structure should be validated.

evidence_summary: g-FleeT publishes a Full Maintenance Lease solution incorporating vehicle acquisition, maintenance, disposal and replacement of vehicles leased for a fixed period.
notes_uncertainties: Primarily public-sector scope; include if public-sector MaaS/fleet operations are in scope.

target_segment: Public and private sector fleet customers
evidence_summary: Vuswa states that it provides comprehensive leasing and fleet management services to the public and private sectors.
notes_uncertainties: Product-level detail not yet captured.

evidence_summary: Fleet Horizon describes itself as a fleet solutions organisation and its contact page lists operating lease, full maintenance lease and consulting/advisory as services provided.
notes_uncertainties: Website contains limited product detail; later phases may need direct validation.

evidence_summary: U-Rent states that it offers customised leasing and fleet management solutions based on business needs.
notes_uncertainties: Later phases should verify vehicle classes and contract models.

evidence_summary: Amasondo publishes fleet solutions including a rent or lease service line.
notes_uncertainties: Lease product depth and ownership require validation before detailed product extraction.
